name: Inversora Juramento S.A.
summary: Inversora Juramento S.A., an agricultural-livestock company, engages in the production, industrialization, and commercialization of beef and agricultural production in the northwestern region of Argentina. It produces and supplies meat; and agricultural products, such as soy, sorgo, alfalfa, and corn. The company has approximately 90,000 hectares of land located in the province of Salta. It also exports its products primarily to Chile and the European Union. Inversora Juramento S.A. was founded in 1990 and is based in Salta, Argentina.
